name: San Luis Potosí Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Queso Fresco, crumbled
12 ounces Cacique Brand Cotija Cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Queso Fresco with the onions, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat the oil in a deep skillet or casserole dish.
3. When hot, place each tortilla in the oil for approximately 20 to 30 seconds on each side, then drain on paper towels.
4. Place each drained tortilla in the enchilada sauce, fill with about ¼ cup of the cheese and onion mixture, roll up, and place side by side into a greased casserole dish.
5. Blanch potatoes and carrots in salted water until tender. Cook the chorizo, drain, and sauté the vegetables in the chorizo.
6. Top the enchiladas with this vegetable mixture and sprinkle with Cotija cheese.
7. Bake at 350ºF for approximately 15 minutes.
